form.formComment: Returns from a 52-day let-up. Last start ran last of 7 at Kembla Grange 4yo+ MDN-Sw on February 17 over 1000m, 7 len behind Zing To Me carrying 57kg at $17. The run before that raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 9 at Kembla Grange Prov 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on February 7 over 1000m, slow going 2.75 len behind Charlina with 54kg at $12. Terrific chance to return to form after the good second two-back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9.5). Returns from a 52-day let-up. Last start ran last of 7 at Kembla Grange 4yo+ MDN-Sw on February 17 over 1000m, 7 len behind Zing To Me carrying 57kg at $17. The run before that raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 9 at Kembla Grange Prov 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on February 7 over 1000m, slow going 2.75 len behind Charlina with 54kg at $12. Terrific chance to return to form after the good second two-back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, shifted in bumping with Initiate.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign when last in a small field at Mudgee Mdn-Sw October 25 over 1400m, soft track; 12 len behind Spirit Of Saintly carrying 57kg at $6.50. First up last campaign ran last of 12 at this track Mdn-Sw September 1 over 1100m, soft track; 14 len behind Newby Bridge carrying 57kg at $91. Poorly drawn and likely to need this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Resuming after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign when last in a small field at Mudgee Mdn-Sw October 25 over 1400m, soft track; 12 len behind Spirit Of Saintly carrying 57kg at $6.50. First up last campaign ran last of 12 at this track Mdn-Sw September 1 over 1100m, soft track; 14 len behind Newby Bridge carrying 57kg at $91. Poorly drawn and likely to need this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly when the paces steadied in the early stages of the event.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Resuming after a ten months break. Not seen since she finished last of 11 at Dubbo Super Mdn-Sw June 6 over 1300m, soft track; 11 len behind Grandini with 55.5kg at $151. On debut eighth of 12 at Dubbo Super Mdn February 16 2025 over 1200m, 7 len behind Take The Chance with 53.5kg at $101. Prefer to see how she returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Resuming after a ten months break. Not seen since she finished last of 11 at Dubbo Super Mdn-Sw June 6 over 1300m, soft track; 11 len behind Grandini with 55.5kg at $151. On debut eighth of 12 at Dubbo Super Mdn February 16 2025 over 1200m, 7 len behind Take The Chance with 53.5kg at $101. Prefer to see how she returns.

form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, got back early 6th of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Farnciful carrying 57kg at $26. Tested in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Jumped at big odds at debut, got back early 6th of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Farnciful carrying 57kg at $26. Tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last of 11 at this track Super Mdn-Sw November 16 over 1100m, 7 len behind Chappolicious carrying 55kg at $61. Previously first up; second of 11 at this track Mdn-Sw November 17 2024 over 1100m, 0.8 len behind Carbrook carrying 57kg at $51. Will take great benefit from this outing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last of 11 at this track Super Mdn-Sw November 16 over 1100m, 7 len behind Chappolicious carrying 55kg at $61. Previously first up; second of 11 at this track Mdn-Sw November 17 2024 over 1100m, 0.8 len behind Carbrook carrying 57kg at $51. Will take great benefit from this outing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover throughout the event.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
Raced very wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation fifth of 11 at Ballarat Synthetic Mdn-Sw August 26 over 1500m, 11 len behind Call Me Phil with 57.5kg at $12. Previously first up; seventh of 14 at Moe Mdn-Sw April 25 over 1200m, 5 len behind Iced Chocolate with 55kg at $14. First run for the new yard and can surprise fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Resumes. Finished off last preparation fifth of 11 at Ballarat Synthetic Mdn-Sw August 26 over 1500m, 11 len behind Call Me Phil with 57.5kg at $12. Previously first up; seventh of 14 at Moe Mdn-Sw April 25 over 1200m, 5 len behind Iced Chocolate with 55kg at $14. First run for the new yard and can surprise fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running from passing the 400m until near the 100m.
Slow into stride. Held up for clear running from the 400m until the 200m.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months second last of 8 at Orange Ctry Mdn on March 22 over 1300m, slow going 7 len behind Allusive Intent with 55.5kg at $21. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Bathurst Mdn on November 15 over 1300m, slow going long-neck behind Casino Sting with 52.5kg at $26. Fitter but others are better placed.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Second run back. First-up after four months second last of 8 at Orange Ctry Mdn on March 22 over 1300m, slow going 7 len behind Allusive Intent with 55.5kg at $21. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Bathurst Mdn on November 15 over 1300m, slow going long-neck behind Casino Sting with 52.5kg at $26. Fitter but others are better placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running rounding the home turn.
Shifted in abruptly upon jumping away.

form.formComment: At debut, 8th of 10 at Newcastle Mdn on March 31 over 900m, 6 len behind Lady Catalina with 57kg at $6.50. Open to plenty of improvement in this easier contest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). At debut, 8th of 10 at Newcastle Mdn on March 31 over 900m, 6 len behind Lady Catalina with 57kg at $6.50. Open to plenty of improvement in this easier contest.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start 5th of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw on October 11 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Chess Master carrying 55kg at $5.50. Returned from break held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at Scone Super Mdn on March 20 over 1000m, on a slow track; 0.8 len behind Lord Remlap with 56.5kg at $31. Strips fitter and expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second-up. First start 5th of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw on October 11 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Chess Master carrying 55kg at $5.50. Returned from break held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at Scone Super Mdn on March 20 over 1000m, on a slow track; 0.8 len behind Lord Remlap with 56.5kg at $31. Strips fitter and expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 300m, corrected after laying in towards the heels of Chess Master.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months from last on the turn 5th of 9 at Warren Mdn on March 21 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Still Excited with 56.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up second last of 10 at Mornington Mdn-Sw on December 5 over 1200m, 9 len behind Dubai Adventure carrying 56kg at $15. Slim place contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Second-up. First-up after three months from last on the turn 5th of 9 at Warren Mdn on March 21 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Still Excited with 56.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up second last of 10 at Mornington Mdn-Sw on December 5 over 1200m, 9 len behind Dubai Adventure carrying 56kg at $15. Slim place contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out rounding the home turn.
Near the 250m, when laying out, steadied when tightened for room by Kalizma.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when ran last of 7 at Kembla Grange Mid 3yo Mdn on August 30 over 1400m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Autumn Blonde with 57kg at $10. Resumes with the one trial placing, respect.
